candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total for current assets; directly matches ACT definition.
Cash-flow reconciliation line for working-capital change, not a balance-sheet stock measure.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current assets line from the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; best match for CHE.
Cash-type line, but appears as a component/alternate label rather than the primary reported cash total.
Cash-type line but no visible values in preview and less preferable than explicit cash and cash equivalents.

variables.notes: Preferred explicit balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents over alternative cash labels.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total for current liabilities; directly matches LCT definition.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current liabilities line from the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Clean current-maturity debt line capturing short-term/current portion of interest-bearing debt; excludes leases.

candidates.row_label: Changed use of bank overdraft facility
candidates.why: Cash-flow movement, not a balance-sheet debt stock; not appropriate for STD.

Direct balance-sheet short-term borrowings line. However, values mirror LT Debt Maturing within 1 Year in visible periods, suggesting they may be alternative labels for the same item; avoid double counting.

variables.notes: Included both labels as a priority list for changing nomenclature across years, not to be summed simultaneously. Excluded lease-related current portions per baseline STD rule.

candidates.why: Exact current tax liability / taxes payable line on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Direct match to taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Clean reported PPE line and best match for total/net property, plant and equipment.
Only a component and gross amount, not total PPE.

variables.notes: Preferred total/net PPE line over component or gross lines.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total assets line; directly matches AT definition.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total assets line.

candidates.why: Exact net cash flow from operating activities line; best match for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before change in working capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not the final operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Selected final operating cash flow rather than the pre-working-capital subtotal.
